title: Nia's Garden Friends
synopsis: Nia discovers a magical garden where she meets friendly creatures and learns that sharing and kindness help friendships bloom like flowers.

pages.text: Nia loved to explore. One sunny morning, she found a special garden behind the big oak tree. Colorful flowers danced in the breeze. A little rabbit hopped out from behind a sunflower.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing at the entrance of a magical garden filled with bright flowers, butterflies, and a friendly white rabbit. Sunlight streams through trees creating a joyful, welcoming scene with primary colors and white space.
illustration.alt: Nia discovering a magical garden with a friendly rabbit

pages.text: "Hello!" said the rabbit. "I'm Rosie. This is our friendship garden. Would you like to meet everyone?" Nia smiled big. She loved making new friends. A blue jay chirped from above, and a tiny hedgehog peeked out from the roses.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes talking to a white rabbit named Rosie, with a bright blue jay perched on a branch and a small hedgehog among pink roses. The scene shows joyful energetic friendship activities in a sunny garden with primary colors.
illustration.alt: Nia meeting her new animal friends in the garden

pages.text: Nia had brought crackers for a snack. "Would you like some?" she asked her new friends. Rosie wiggled her nose happily. The blue jay, Jay, sang a thank-you song. Pip the hedgehog rolled into a happy ball.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes sitting on grass sharing crackers with Rosie the rabbit, Jay the blue jay, and Pip the hedgehog. The scene shows inclusive friendship activities with laughter and sharing in bright primary colors with white space.
illustration.alt: Nia sharing snacks with her animal friends

pages.text: After their snack, they played hide and seek among the flower beds. They laughed and giggled until sunset. "Will you come back tomorrow?" asked Rosie. "Yes!" said Nia. "Friends always come back to play!" The garden sparkled with friendship magic.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes playing hide and seek with her animal friends among colorful flower beds at sunset. The scene shows joyful energetic play with bright primary colors, laughter, and the magical sparkle of friendship in the garden.
illustration.alt: Nia playing with her friends as the sun sets over the magical garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: What did Nia find behind the big oak tree?
questions.explanation: Nia found a special friendship garden behind the big oak tree where she met her animal friends.

questions.question: What was the rabbit's name?
questions.explanation: The friendly white rabbit's name was Rosie, and she welcomed Nia to the friendship garden.

questions.question: What did Nia share with her new friends?
questions.explanation: Nia shared her crackers with Rosie, Jay, and Pip, showing how sharing helps make friendships grow.

questions.question: What game did they play together?
questions.explanation: Nia and her animal friends played hide and seek among the flower beds, having lots of fun together.
